item.title: Stickers on Switzerland dump
item.dc:creator: Odoyyoxigoyxc

item.title: 10 Years Makes a Big Difference in Cosplay
item.description: Aww look how cute and emo I used to be when I first started posting my cosplays online! Ten years makes a big difference in... many ways... Obviously the biggest difference is in improved cosplay design and experience... *cough cough*.... I redid this cosplay this weekend and it suddenly clicked that I had done this before, and unearthed this ancient photo. Good times, but also yeah, you can definitely see a big confidence shift. (Yes, the archive pic is on the right... I'll spare you the trouble of making jokes about it by pointing that out now :P)
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

item.title: Galadriel was not last Elf left to have seen the Trees' Light – and why it was not what the film implied
item.description:
Have seen the meme/post many times, and on repeat; often been asked about its [double lack of] validity, so made this so it can be easily shared
Director of photography Andrew Lesnie (1956–2015) in Cameras in Middle-earth, at minute 34
— — — — — Index: character bios https://imgur.com/gallery/axV2mPF Index: folks, animals, items, etc https://imgur.com/gallery/AQK9pJL
item.dc:creator: Ngugi

item.dc:creator: DumpsterKoala

item.title: Some Programming Humor For A Niche Audience (BLESSED I.T. SUNDAY)
item.description:
1_WhatIsThisCreature
2_WhenYouTellAsianDadThatYouWIllNotBeAProgammer
3_WriteThisDown
4_GoodThingTheyWrappedTheCablesInNiceCircularObjectsOtherwiseItCouldHaveBeenAMess
5
6_FoundInTheWild
7_WebsitesTheseDays
8_LeastToxicProductManager
9
10_WhatIsHolePics
11
12_GuysWeShouldStartOurOwnTechStartUp
13_ITSupportInOtherSItuations_part_1
14_ITSupportInOtherSItuations_part_2
15. Thank you for making it all the way down! I feel like writing today and would like to share a little bit about a passion project I'm working on and why this means so much to me. Do Not Press The Button is more than just a game to me—it's a labor of love, born out of countless hours of passion, creativity, and dedication. When I first started working on this project, my goal was to create something that would not only entertain but also resonate with players on a deeper level. It started as a goofy idea, but now, almost at the finish line, I believe I've managed to give it heart, soul, and spirit. As an independent developer, the journey has been both incredibly rewarding and challenging. I've poured everything I've got into this project, and now, I'm at a point where I need your support to bring this dream fully to life. I believe in Do Not Press The Button with all my heart, and I truly hope it will bring as much joy to you as it has brought me while creating it. Your support—whether through wishlisting, sharing, or simply cheering from the sidelines—would mean the world to me. Thank you for considering this and for being part of this journey. I couldn’t do this without you. https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ P.S. Have an amazing SUNDAY!
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: Walking the Walk: Joseph Gordon-Levitt Rejecs Former President Donald Trump's $70,000 Tax Cut ...
item.description: "And by the way, he doesn't want to give that to everybody, but I just read that's the average tax break for the top 1% if Donald Trump is elected president," Joseph said, referring to CNN's story about how the top 5% of taxpayers would get nearly half the benefit if Trump's 2017 Tax Cuts and Jobs Act is extended. https://x.com/hitRECordJoe/status/1829519845919998007 While the tax cut would essentially benefit Joseph, he's challenging the proposal and endorsing Trump's opponent. "Do you want to talk about who's going to really help most Americans? It's Kamala."
item.dc:creator: Jbelkin

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1120 (BELL RIOTS DAY)
item.description:
HAPPY BELL RIOTS DAY! Let's riot about this bread and remember, the people causing our capitalist dystopia keeping us from a Star Trek world do have addresses! Yeah, I know I did a trekpost last Sunday. Whatever. I AIN'T MISSING THE BELL RIOTS.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "Love you too, love you too, PIPPIN! good boy, good boyyy, pretty bird, glory Pippin." May the molotov cocktails we throw light the way into a better world.
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett
